name: Pickled Green Beans with Savory
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and dry the green beans thoroughly.
2. Remove the ends of the beans, trimming them to fit vertically in jars with 1/2 inch headspace.
3. Prepare the jars, lids, and boiling water bath as per package instructions.
4. Fill each jar with the prepared green beans and two sprigs of fresh summer savory.
5. In a non-reactive pan, combine vinegar, water, pickling salt, and sugar. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat, stirring occasionally.
6. Pour the hot liquid into the jars, ensuring the beans are just covered.
7. Wipe the rims of the jars clean with a towel and secure the lids.
8. Place the filled jars in a boiling water bath and process for 15 minutes.
